query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS contractor_ratings (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  contractor_abn VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,
  contractor_name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  overall_rating DECIMAL(3,2) DEFAULT 0,
  accuracy_score DECIMAL(3,2) DEFAULT 0,
  compliance_score DECIMAL(3,2) DEFAULT 0,
  communication_score DECIMAL(3,2) DEFAULT 0,
  total_reviews INT DEFAULT 0,
  total_quotes_verified INT DEFAULT 0,
  avg_price_variance DECIMAL(5,2) DEFAULT 0,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX idx_contractor_abn (contractor_abn),
  INDEX idx_overall_rating (overall_rating)
)

  avg_price_variance DECIMAL(5,2) DEFAULT 0,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX idx_contractor_abn (contractor_abn),
  INDEX idx_overall_rating (overall_rating)
